title: Visible Powdered Snow
description: Make powdered snow more visible, while keeping it pretty.
body:
**Visible Powdered Snow**

A small resource pack that changes the powdered snow to look slightly different from the normal snow, while not making it ugly. There are two different versions, so you can pick whichever you like more! 

Why? Because I hate powdered snow.

 

This pack should work for any version that adds powdered snow. If it doesn’t, let me know :)

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
